title: Handpainted Fruit Wreath Pizza Plate
description:
A round pizza plate with a green rim and a generous wreath of hand-painted fruit circling the inside. Our artisans in Vietri sul Mare shape each one on the wheel and decorate it freehand — no transfers, no stencils, just a steady hand and a brush.

The rim is glazed in a mottled teal green, and the fruit ring inside includes lemons, grapes, red apples, and peaches, all nestled among green leaves and soft blue scrollwork. The centre is left white, giving you a clean open space for serving. The colours are warm and natural — yellows, greens, reds — against that fresh white background.

It's sized for pizza, which is how most people use it. But it also makes a fine serving plate for grilled vegetables, a cheese board, or a round of bruschette. The slightly raised rim keeps things tidy. Made with food-safe glazes and a glossy finish that wipes clean.

Every plate is painted individually, so the position of the fruit and the exact shade of each colour will vary a little. That's what you get with handmade work from a real workshop.
excerpt: A ceramic pizza plate with a teal-green rim and a hand-painted wreath of lemons, grapes, and apples. Made in Vietri sul Mare.
seoTitle: Handpainted Fruit Wreath Pizza Plate — Ceramiche Da Mario
seoDescription: Handmade ceramic pizza plate with fruit wreath and green rim, painted freehand by artisans in Vietri sul Mare. Ceramiche Da Mario, Praiano.
